muxt generate --use-receiver-type=T
muxt check

exec go test -count=1

-- template.gohtml --
{{- define "GET /empty Empty()" -}}{{- end -}}
{{- define "GET /full Full()" -}}<p>{{- .Result -}}</p>{{- end -}}
-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.22
-- template.go --
package server

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))

type T struct{}

func (T) Empty() string { return "ignored because template renders nothing" }

func (T) Full() string { return "hi" }
-- template_test.go --
package server

import (
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httptest"
	"testing"
)

func Test(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	TemplateRoutes(mux, T{})

	t.Run("empty body is 204", func(t *testing.T) {
		req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/empty", nil)
		rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
		mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)
		if rec.Code != http.StatusNoContent {
			t.Errorf("status = %d, want %d", rec.Code, http.StatusNoContent)
		}
		if rec.Body.Len() != 0 {
			t.Errorf("body len = %d, want 0", rec.Body.Len())
		}
	})

	t.Run("non-empty body is 200", func(t *testing.T) {
		req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/full", nil)
		rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
		mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)
		if rec.Code != http.StatusOK {
			t.Errorf("status = %d, want %d", rec.Code, http.StatusOK)
		}
	})
}
